growth_records.snippet: The generation time for H. pylori strains J99 and 26695 was calculated to be 3.90 and 4 h respectively, similar to previous calculations
growth_records.notes: Paper's own OD600 growth-curve-derived generation time for strain J99 = 3.90 h (liquid culture, 37°C, microaerobic jars with Anaerocult C gas bags, starting OD600≈0.06, monitored up to 72 h). mu = ln2/3.90 = 0.178 h-1 (calculated by us from reported generation time). Medium composition not explicitly given in available text.
